D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

Atkinson Dither — Mac System 1 Classic (1984)

Bill Atkinson's variant only diffuses 6/8 of error to a 6-cell pattern; gives the high-contrast crisp look of the original 1-bit Mac display

Atkinson loses 2/8 of the error on every pixel — the image goes slightly darker but edges stay crisp. Used in HyperCard, MacPaint, and the original 512×342 Mac display. Still beloved by 1-bit-art enthusiasts and retro game devs.

Slide levels.
